type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The Dioxins and Furans indicated in the tailings are not actually contained in the mine tailings but are from the onsite solid waste incinerator scrubber blowdown water.  The scrubber blowdown is eventually sent to the tailings containment area, and is assumed to settle there.  In 2011 we made the assumption that the dioxins and furans in contained in the scrubber blowdown was eventually released to the North Granny Creek, upon further thought settlement into the tailings containment is a more accurate assumption.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
0.05 mg/yr TEQ of Dioxins and Furans released to air the Recent Compliance stack testing results on the incinerator indicated that majority of the individual dioxins and furans congeners were not dectected above the dectection limit.

Testing was done this year on the scrubber discharge to determine the quanity of Dioxins and Furans released to water.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Recent Compliance stack testing results on the incinerator did not indicate the presence of Hexachlorobenzene above the method dectection limit, reporting is indicated based on the method detection limit

substance.en: Vanadium (except when in an alloy) and its compounds
substance.fr: Vanadium (sauf lorsqu'il est dans un alliage) et ses composés

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
0.1 mg/yr TEQ of Dioxins and Furans released to air the Recent Compliance stack testing results on the incinerator indicated that majority of the individual dioxins and furans congeners were not dectected above the dectection limit.

Testing was done this year on the scrubber discharge to determine the quanity of Dioxins and Furans released to water.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
The Dioxins and Furans indicated in the tailings are not actually contained in the mine tailings but are from
the onsite solid waste incinerator scrubber blowdown water. The scrubber blowdown is eventually sent to
the tailings containment area, and is assumed to settle there. The concentrations in the incinerator
scrubber blowdown water are indicated above dectection limits

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
Updated source testing results, Increased incinerator use. The Dioxins and Furans indicated in
the tailings are not actually contained in the mine tailings but are from the onsite solid waste incinerator scrubber blowdown water. The scrubber blowdown is eventually sent to the tailings containment area, and is assumed to settle there.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Less waste incinerated in 2020

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: In 2020 the DeBeers Victor mine was in the decommissioning phase of their operations, therefore mine production and transfers to tailings were not occurring and consequently the metals reporting thresholds were not exceeded. There is a small amount of cadmium (0.0037 kg) that originates from the onsite incinerator scrubber blowdown water that is eventually released into the tailings containment area and any metals in the scrubber blowdown is assumed to settle there.
